header.title: Polywise Brand Guidelines
header.desc: Resources for presenting the Polywise brand consistently and professionally.

naming.title: Naming
naming.line_1: "Polywise" is a single word, always displayed with capital letters "Polywise". It is the brand name of the application (not "Polywise gtd"). When referring to specific modules of Polywise, we request that they be written as proper nouns and capitalized (e.g. "Polywise Note").
naming.line_2: The name "Polywise" is inspired by programming. When creating Polywise, I drew inspiration from programming to create a flexible, programmable, locally-first, scalable content creation app with infinite possibilities. "Polywise" does not mean "if", but rather represents a forward-looking state—a prediction and realization of the future.

usage.title: Usage
usage.line_1: Ensure there is ample space around Polywise assets. Whether you size them up or down, make sure they have enough breathing room. They should never appear crowded or overly busy.
usage.line_2: You may use the Polywise brand and intellectual property at your discretion, provided it does not damage the integrity of the Polywise brand and is factually accurate. You may modify the relevant materials provided by Polywise, as long as it does not alter the brand's image. You may use the Polywise brand logo as part of your own product, but only if your product is part of the Polywise ecosystem. Otherwise, you are not permitted to display the Polywise brand logo in any commercial activities. Without prior permission, the Polywise brand logo must be used independently and should not be combined with other graphics. If you have any questions, please contact us.

logo.title: Logo
logo.desc: The logo of Polywise represents both Polywise and its text, serving as a concise way to refer to Polywise. Use it with discretion depending on your audience, as the Polywise logo requires more white space to display effectively in borderless contexts.

icon.title: Icon
icon.desc: The Polywise icon consists of a rounded rectangle enclosing the Polywise logo. If you are introducing Polywise on social media, please use this icon as it provides better contrast and does not require additional typography.

colors.title: Colors
colors.desc: The brand color of Polywise is pure red, which symbolizes passion and vitality for an efficiency and creativity application. Red is the color of blood, representing life, and time is the measure of life. Through the use of a pure red theme, Polywise brings positive energy to users, while also emphasizing the limited nature of time to make people confront the finite nature of life.

font.title: Font
font.desc: Polywise uses IBMPlexSans as its primary font. IBMPlexSans features unique curves, combining the easy readability of a sans-serif font with the refined elegance of a serif font.
